## Identity

The diamond's join hub: both the beach rout and the granary fire converge
here, where Dagon Quorwyn ends up commanding a killing he never wanted and
Ormund's own war kills him. Two reified beats hang off this hub — the
granary floor and the eel-king's fall — plus a hub-level command edge that
sits above either beat.
